title: CA6 4SE, Verus Energy Boltzmann Project Co Limited: permit surrender issued -  EPR/SP3609BX/S003
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter for:    Operator name: Verus Energy Boltzmann Project Co Limited   Installation name: Kingmoor Park Industrial Estate   Permit number: EPR/SP3609BX/S003   "
